title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 4 - Sensing (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to artificial intelligence and computer science, available through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare. Chapter 4 covers Sensing and is presented by Brian Yu and David J. Malan. The course is offered under a Creative Commons license and accompanied by a broad community presence across multiple platforms.
writeup: This is Chapter 4, "Sensing," of CS50's introduction to artificial intelligence and computer science, presented by Brian Yu and David J. Malan in a live, unedited session. The course comes from Harvard University and is available through edX, Harvard Extension School, Harvard Summer School, and OpenCourseWare, offered under a Creative Commons license. The material is part of a broader introduction to AI concepts, with this chapter focused on sensing.
